title: Fragrant Hangover-Curing Chinese Mars Bar Century Egg Congee
description: A savory and sweet congee dish featuring the unmistakable flavors of Mars Bars, layered with crispy lamination-puff for a delightful textural contrast. Perfect for a hangover cure.
instructions: Combine congee rice and water in a medium saucepan, bringing to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to a simmer, covering the saucepan with a lid.
Meanwhile, heat sesame oil in a small pan over medium heat.
Add lamination-puff to the pan, toasting until crispy and golden brown.
Chop the toasted lamination-puff into small pieces.
Chop Mars Bars into small pieces, setting aside.
Mince scallions and ginger, setting aside.
Once the congee has cooked, remove from heat and stir in soy sauce.
Create a small well in the congee, cracking an egg white into it.
Stir the egg white into the congee, cooking until set.
Add the chopped lamination-puff, Mars Bars, scallions, and ginger to the congee.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the congee hot, garnished with scallion oil and a sliced century egg (if using).
